_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The coil has produced zero ±2-point moves across 38 windows, so HOLD is the statistically honest default until funding spikes above 0.01% and stablecoin growth accelerates past 60.
next_move.brains_agree: Both agree on sideways/coil regime but disagree on directional implication — analyst waits for a breaker, narrative leans toward a mean-reversion bounce.
next_move.confirmed_if: Funding rises above 0.01% with stablecoin_growth breaking 60 and BTC momentum sustaining above 55.
next_move.invalidated_if: VIX breaks 22 with DXY strengthening above 103 and BTC funding flipping negative, signaling risk-off repricing.
